strategy: Always keep a shield on yourself before attacking. Hitting him with a 6+ pip spell while you have no shield triggers a 600-damage Vampire counter on the attacker.
Damage-over-time spells and low-rank spells do not trigger the counter - an alternative if you cannot stay shielded.
Hit with Storm or Death - he takes 35% more from both and resists Myth 80%.
He strips all wards from a random wizard every other round, so reapply your shield right before you hit rather than early.
He is stunable and beguilable - stun to skip his ward-strip turn while you set up.
cheatNotes: Attacking him with a 6+ pip spell while you have no shield up triggers an interrupt Vampire dealing 600 to you. Keep a shield on yourself.
The counter appears tied to 6+ pip spells; smaller spells do not seem to trigger it.
Damage-over-time spells do not trigger the Vampire counter - a safe way to deal damage unshielded.
Every other round he strips all wards from a random wizard. Re-shield right before you attack.
